lessons.lesson: lghui.top 只能证明公开入口，真实账号仍必须回 pages.dev 账号态。
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Require site-updates, public shell, _edge-status, browser entry, and auth-chain rows as separate proof classes.

lessons.lesson: source pushed is not production latest. Public shell commit and Pages deploy URL must be named before closure.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep source SHA, public-shell SHA, deploy URL, and lghui.top version in the release summary.

lessons.lesson: _edge-status uses edgeHomeVersion, not a generic version key. Temporary proof scripts must inspect the real field.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Check edgeHomeVersion on both production and deploy-specific URLs.

lessons.lesson: Browser proof needs bundled Playwright fallback instead of weakening QA when local node_modules is empty.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Use NODE_PATH to the Codex runtime node_modules for browser gates; do not npm install into the repo.

lessons.lesson: Old round264 markers may remain as historical records but must not be the current public shell version.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Treat round264 history as allowed only when site-updates top and public shell latest are current.

lessons.lesson: The true exam source of truth is 316 atomic questions, not a smaller merged section count.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Gate every real-exam visible ledger on 316 source atoms and 316 web atoms.

lessons.lesson: 61 grouped source sections and 201 grouped web question ids are separate anchors.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Never collapse grouped sections into parent questions; report collapse loss explicitly.

lessons.lesson: Some short-answer years legitimately have four or five items. The UI must call that out instead of normalizing down.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep four/five question locks and high-risk year rows visible in JSON and page copy.

lessons.lesson: Answer row presence is not original answer PDF proof.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep derived/unproven answer status separate from question-stem source fidelity.

lessons.lesson: 181103 can enrich review routes, but it must never change original question counts.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Link 181103 routes back to real-exam review tasks without editing source exam atoms.

lessons.lesson: The protected 181103 folder is represented by redacted repo data, not by raw local path reads during panic isolation.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Use existing safe JSON indexes and keep local home paths, external-volume paths, file URLs, and raw download URLs out of public artifacts.

lessons.lesson: 38 protected materials, 30 routes, and 61 review tasks form the current safe public accounting.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Make those counts visible where 181103 is mentioned, and fail if they drift.

lessons.lesson: Material groups, file types, chapters, study goals, and question types are safe summaries when detached from raw filenames.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Prefer grouped summaries over file lists in student-facing pages.

lessons.lesson: 181103 should lead students back to knowledge, formulas, real exams, and mistake review.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Avoid dead-end protected inventory pages; every 181103 panel needs a site-native next action.

lessons.lesson: No local path leak is a release criterion, not a doc nicety.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Scan all Round306 artifacts for local path, file URL, session header, credential header, and access-key markers.

lessons.lesson: FM_AUDIT KV is audit plumbing; it is not private media storage recovery.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Require FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 before upload, publish, access-change, archive, or dynamic delete recovery claims.

lessons.lesson: UI/mock private-video success is not production recovery.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep productionActionsReady false until both R2 binding and real teacher/student browser QA pass.

lessons.lesson: Delete must stay dry-run-first and typed course-id confirmed.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep delete preflight, typed course id confirmation, and row busy state in teacher-panel gates.

lessons.lesson: Blocked production states must be useful to teachers, not buried in release JSON.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Show the exact missing binding, expected prefix, and rerun command near the teacher action controls.

lessons.lesson: Do not search for credentials or print credential values when auth-chain QA is blocked.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Only report missing env labels and stop; real account QA needs provided test credentials.

lessons.lesson: Count ledgers are high-trust UI and must survive 390px screens.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Use wrapping strips, compact rows, and mobile-specific table reductions for count-heavy panels.

lessons.lesson: Buttons for route chips, video controls, and destructive actions need explicit labels and stable dimensions.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Keep aria labels, live regions, and focus states in the release gate for modified surfaces.

lessons.lesson: Large JSON additions need gzip sidecars and budget checks.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Regenerate gzip sidecars and run public JSON/mobile performance budgets after adding artifacts.

lessons.lesson: Do not put every audit row on the first screen.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Surface the summary and use intent links to drill into JSON/docs, keeping the learning route readable.

lessons.lesson: Resource pages need status feedback even when protected/private data is unavailable.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Use aria-live status and clear fallback copy for 181103 and private-video load states.

lessons.lesson: Generated ledgers must own their claims; page copy should link to them instead of restating unsupported facts.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Add new tools/data/docs first, then wire page links and tests to the generated artifacts.

lessons.lesson: A generatedAt refresh changes tracked artifacts and must be committed or reverted deliberately.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: After running writing checkers, inspect git diff before claiming clean release state.

lessons.lesson: Worker-local changes do not count until main-thread integration runs the global gates.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Integrate worker outputs into version authorities, release readiness, public shell, and lghui.top proof.

lessons.lesson: New round artifacts should ship as checker + JSON + gzip + Markdown.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Fail readiness when any artifact family member is missing or gzip mismatches.

lessons.lesson: Every release summary must distinguish done, blocked, and not-run.
lessons.antiRegressionGate: Use ready-with-hard-stop-blockers when public release is current but real-account/R2 recovery remains blocked.

acceptance.meaning: Round306 optimization memory captures reusable website lessons without exposing protected paths or weakening real-account/R2 blockers.
